DIMDATE.description: Standard date dimension with fiscal calendar support. Used as a role-playing dimension across all fact tables.

DATEHASHPK.description: Surrogate primary key for date dimension

DATEKEY.description: Integer date key in YYYYMMDD format for partitioning

DAYNAME.description: Full name of day (Sunday, Monday, etc.)

WEEKOFYEAR.description: ISO week number within the year (1-53)

MONTHNAME.description: Full name of month (January, February, etc.)

YEARMONTH.description: Year and month in YYYY-MM format

YEARQUARTER.description: Year and quarter in YYYY-Q# format

ISLASTDAYOFMONTH.description: True if last day of calendar month

ISLASTDAYOFQUARTER.description: True if last day of calendar quarter

ISLASTDAYOFYEAR.description: True if last day of calendar year

DIMEMPLOYEE.description: Employee master for tracking sales associates and other staff involved in transactions.

EMPLOYEEHASHPK.description: Surrogate primary key for employee dimension

EMPLOYEEHASHBK.description: Natural business key (employee ID from HR system)

TERMINATIONDATE.description: Date employee was terminated (NULL if active)

MANAGEREMPLOYEEHASHFK.description: Foreign key to manager employee record

HOMESTOREHASHFK.description: Foreign key to employee primary store location

ISACTIVE.description: True if employee is currently employed

ETLBATCHID.description: ETL batch identifier that loaded this record

DIMSTORE.description: Retail store locations with geographic hierarchy (Region > District > Store).

STOREHASHPK.description: Surrogate primary key for store dimension

STORETYPE.description: Type of store (Flagship, Standard, Outlet, Express)

CLOSEDATE.description: Date store closed (NULL if still open)

ISACTIVE.description: True if store is currently operating

ETLBATCHID.description: ETL batch identifier that loaded this record

DIMSUPPLIER.description: Supplier master with contact information and payment terms.

SUPPLIERHASHPK.description: Surrogate primary key for supplier dimension

SUPPLIERHASHBK.description: Natural business key (supplier ID from procurement system)

ISACTIVE.description: True if supplier is currently active

ISPREFERRED.description: True if supplier is a preferred vendor

ETLBATCHID.description: ETL batch identifier that loaded this record

DIMWAREHOUSE.description: Warehouse and distribution center locations with geographic hierarchy (Region > District > Warehouse).

WAREHOUSEHASHPK.description: Surrogate primary key for warehouse dimension

WAREHOUSETYPE.description: Type of warehouse (Distribution Center, Regional, Local)

TOTALCAPACITYUNITS.description: Total storage capacity in standard units

ISACTIVE.description: True if warehouse is currently operating

ETLBATCHID.description: ETL batch identifier that loaded this record

DIMPRODUCT.description: Product master with full hierarchy (Category > Subcategory > Brand > Product). Supports SCD Type 2 for historical tracking.

PRODUCTHASHPK.description: Surrogate primary key for product dimension.

PRODUCTHASHBK.description: Natural business key from source system (SKU).

BRANDNAME.description: Brand display name (third level of hierarchy).

CATEGORYNAME.description: Product category name (top level of hierarchy).

ISACTIVE.description: True if product is currently active for sale.

ISDISCONTINUED.description: True if product has been discontinued.

SUBCATEGORYNAME.description: Product subcategory name (second level of hierarchy).

UNITCOST.description: Standard unit cost at time of record.

UNITLISTPRICE.description: Standard list price at time of record.

UNITOFMEASURE.description: Standard unit of measure (Each, Case, Pound, etc.).

EFFECTIVESTARTDATETIME.description: Start of Type 2 version validity window.

EFFECTIVEENDDATETIME.description: End of Type 2 version validity window.

CURRENTFLAGYN.description: Flag indicating if this is the current active version (Y) or historical (N).

CREATEDDATETIME.description: Timestamp when the record version was created in the target.

MODIFIEDDATETIME.description: Timestamp when the record version was last modified.

FILENAME.description: Source file name for audit (Fivetran: none).

STAGEINSERTEDDATETIMEUTC.description: UTC timestamp when record was synced into the bronze staging table by Fivetran.

HASHBYTES.description: Hash over business attributes used for change-detection in Type 2 SCD.

DATACONDITION.description: Indicates which Data Condition the record originated from.

DIMCUSTOMER.description: Customer master with loyalty program information and acquisition tracking. Supports SCD Type 2.

CUSTOMERHASHPK.description: Surrogate primary key for customer dimension.

CUSTOMERHASHBK.description: Natural business key (customer ID from CRM). Note: CRM uses CUSTOMER_ID as both PK and BK.

ACQUISITIONCHANNEL.description: How customer was acquired (Online, Store, Referral, Advertising).

ISACTIVE.description: True if customer account is active.

LOYALTYTIER.description: Current loyalty tier (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum).

EFFECTIVESTARTDATETIME.description: Start of Type 2 version validity window.

EFFECTIVEENDDATETIME.description: End of Type 2 version validity window.

CURRENTFLAGYN.description: Flag indicating if this is the current active version (Y) or historical (N).

CREATEDDATETIME.description: Timestamp when the record version was created in the target.

MODIFIEDDATETIME.description: Timestamp when the record version was last modified.

SOURCECUSTOMERBK.description: Original CUSTOMER_ID used as business key (pre-hash).

FILENAME.description: Source file name for audit (Fivetran: none).

STAGEINSERTEDDATETIMEUTC.description: UTC timestamp when record was synced into the bronze staging table by Fivetran.

HASHBYTES.description: Hash over business attributes used for change-detection in Type 2 SCD.

DATACONDITION.description: Indicates which Data Condition the record originated from.

FACTSALES.description: Sales transaction line items capturing all retail sales activity. Returns are modeled as negative quantities.

SALESHASHPK.description: Surrogate primary key for sales fact

DATEHASHFK.description: Foreign key to date dimension (transaction date)

CUSTOMERHASHFK.description: Foreign key to customer dimension (NULL for anonymous sales)

EMPLOYEEHASHFK.description: Foreign key to employee dimension (sales associate)

TRANSACTIONLINENUMBER.description: Line item number within the transaction

UNITPRICE.description: Unit selling price at time of transaction

UNITCOST.description: Unit cost at time of transaction

GROSSAMOUNT.description: Gross amount before discounts (Quantity x UnitPrice)

NETAMOUNT.description: Net amount after discounts and tax

ISPROMOTION.description: True if item was sold under a promotion

PAYMENTMETHOD.description: Payment method used (Cash, Credit, Debit, GiftCard)

ETLBATCHID.description: ETL batch identifier that loaded this record

FACTINVENTORYSNAPSHOT.description: Daily snapshot of inventory positions at each warehouse location.

INVENTORYSNAPSHOTHASHPK.description: Surrogate primary key for inventory snapshot

DATEHASHFK.description: Foreign key to date dimension (snapshot date)

QUANTITYAVAILABLE.description: Quantity available for new orders (OnHand - Reserved)

QUANTITYINTRANSIT.description: Quantity currently in transit to warehouse

DAYSOFSUPPLY.description: Estimated days of supply based on avg demand

ETLBATCHID.description: ETL batch identifier that loaded this record

FACTPURCHASEORDER.description: Purchase order tracking with milestone dates and quantities at each stage. Row is updated as PO progresses.

PURCHASEORDERHASHPK.description: Surrogate primary key for purchase order fact

WAREHOUSEHASHFK.description: Foreign key to receiving warehouse dimension

DATEORDEREDHASHFK.description: Foreign key to date dimension (order placed date)

DATEEXPECTEDHASHFK.description: Foreign key to date dimension (expected delivery date)

DATESHIPPEDHASHFK.description: Foreign key to date dimension (supplier ship date)

DATERECEIVEDHASHFK.description: Foreign key to date dimension (warehouse received date)

DATEINVOICEDHASHFK.description: Foreign key to date dimension (invoice received date)

PURCHASEORDERLINENUMBER.description: Line item number within the PO

ORDERSTATUS.description: Current status (Ordered, Shipped, Received, Invoiced, Closed, Cancelled)

UNITCOST.description: Agreed unit cost on purchase order

ORDERAMOUNT.description: Total order line amount (QuantityOrdered x UnitCost)

DAYSTOSHIP.description: Days from order to ship (DateShipped - DateOrdered)

DAYSTOINVOICE.description: Days from receipt to invoice (DateInvoiced - DateReceived)

ETLBATCHID.description: ETL batch identifier that loaded this record

LOADTIMESTAMP.description: Timestamp when record was last updated
